falsification_conditions.condition: The asset's price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend continuation, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a blowoff but a reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 300% above the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would signal massive buying pressure, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by proving a clear directional move is underway.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks below the 2022 May low (3,800) by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a bear market acceleration, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and proving the pattern is not a bottom but a blowoff.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
